name: Miniature Orange Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease miniature muffin cups.
3. Mix together the sugar and orange juice. Set aside for dipping after the muffins are baked.
4. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
5. Add the sour cream alternately with the dry ingredients, just until moistened.
6. Fold in the grated orange peel, raisins, and chopped nuts. The batter will be stiff.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes.
8. While still warm, dip the muffins in the sugar-orange juice mixture.
9. Makes about 36 miniature muffins.
